summary: Ship. Round 2 re-verification found both release findings resolved: restoreModification now returns the unchanged state when its profile is absent, preventing orphaned materialized values; CSP directive-name inputs expose aria-invalid and reference the inline error. The focused tests exercise the relevant guard and accessibility/storage behavior, and the fixes introduce no new critical issue. Live test execution was blocked by the read-only sandbox because Vite attempted to create temporary files; diff inspection and git diff --check succeeded.
triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
